question: Define an abstract base class `Printable` with a pure virtual method `print()`. Derive two concrete classes, `Document` and `Image`, from `Printable`. Implement the `print()` method in each derived class to display appropriate information (e.g., 'Printing Document: [title]', 'Printing Image: [filename]').

test_cases.input: Polymorphic print and delete of Document ('Memo_to_staff')
Polymorphic print and delete of Image ('logo.svg')
